empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file, a URL, or search vetted community skills

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Imported content is stored as untrusted data — never executed. The skill stays disabled until you vet and enable it.
file.dropTitle: Import a markdown file or a .zip archive
file.ignoredTitle: {count} non-markdown file(s) ignored (never run, never stored)
file.success: Imported "{name}" — disabled until you vet + enable it.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

preview.heading: Preview
preview.renderedAs: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.
preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.

stats.noAgentsBody: Link this skill to an agent from the agent's Skills tab to see usage here.
stats.noFindingsTitle: No findings in the last 30 days
stats.noFindingsBody: Findings appear once this skill's agents review a pull request.
stats.errorBody: The skill statistics failed to load.

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — write it directively, as an instruction to the reviewing agent.
config.bodyHint: Markdown. Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
config.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently deletes "{name}" and all its versions, and removes it from every agent that uses it. This can't be undone.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible against the exact text they scored.
versions.emptyBody: Save a change to the body to create the first snapshot.

context.title: Context
context.hint: Attach Markdown docs discovered in a repo clone (specs, docs, insights). Only the path is stored — content is read fresh from the repo at run time.
context.selectRepoBody: Pick a repository from the nav switcher to browse and attach its project context documents.
context.notClonedBody: Clone this repo to discover its project context documents.
context.emptyBody: No Markdown files were found under this repo's configured root folders.
context.untrustedNote: Attached documents are injected into every run of this skill's agents as an untrusted, path-labelled block — vet them like any other imported content.

new.defaultBody:
# New skill

Describe the rule the reviewing agent should apply…
new.created: Created a new skill — edit its body and enable it.
